cssRulesSample..content input[type=\"radio\"], .page__b: .content input[type="radio"], .page__button__arrow__inner, .page__nav, .page__nav__button { align-items: center; display: flex; justify-content: center; }
cssRulesSample..content .page__input__container__radio: .content .page__input__container__radio label, .content input[type="email"], .content input[type="tel"], .content input[type="text"], .content textarea { font-family: neue-haas-grotesk-display, sans-serif; font-size: 5rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; line-height: 1.3; }
cssRulesSample..page__nav: .page__nav { bottom: calc(50% - 8.8rem); flex-flow: column; gap: clamp(7px, 5.47059px + 0.392157vw, 13px); position: absolute; top: calc(50% - 8.8rem); width: 12rem; }
cssRulesSample..page__nav__button: .page__nav__button { aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0); border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; pointer-events: none; transition: border-color 0.4s; width: 18px; }
cssRulesSample..page__nav__button::before: .page__nav__button::before { aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); border-radius: 50%; content: ""; position: absolute; width: 8px; }
cssRulesSample..page__line.left: .page__line.left { border-left: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); margin-left: calc(var(--col-g)*-1 - 1px); margin-right: calc(var(--page-pd)*-1 + 1px); }
cssRulesSample..page__input__container, .page__input__c: .page__input__container, .page__input__container__radio { display: flex; flex-flow: column; grid-column: span 2; position: relative; }
cssRulesSample..content .page__input__container__radio: .content .page__input__container__radio label { color: rgb(124, 124, 124); cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.5s; }
cssRulesSample..page__input__container__radio: .page__input__container__radio { align-items: center; border: 1px solid rgba(181, 181, 181, 0.5); border-radius: clamp(12px, 9.96078px + 0.522876vw, 20px); column-gap: clamp(11px, 5.64706px + 1.37255vw, 32px); cursor: pointer; flex-flow: row; padding: clamp(18px, 15.451px + 0.653595vw, 28px) clamp(26px, 21.4118px + 1.17647vw, 44px); transition: background-color 0.5s, border-color 0.5s; }
cssRulesSample..page__button__arrow: .page__button__arrow { aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 50%; overflow: hidden; position: relative; transition: background-color 0.4s; width: 60px; }
cssRulesSample..page__button__arrow__inner::after, .pag: .page__button__arrow__inner::after, .page__button__arrow__inner::before { border: 2px solid rgb(151, 151, 151); content: ""; position: absolute; transition: border-color 0.4s; }
cssRulesSample..page__button__arrow__inner::before: .page__button__arrow__inner::before { border-top-width: medium; border-top-style: none; border-top-color: currentcolor; width: 18px; }
cssRulesSample..page__button__arrow__inner::after: .page__button__arrow__inner::after { aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; border-bottom-width: medium; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-color: currentcolor; border-left-width: medium; border-left-style: none; border-left-color: currentcolor; margin-left: 5px; transform: rotate(45deg); width: 12px; }
cssRulesSample..about__contact__title p span, .about__p: .about__contact__title p span, .about__positioning__item span, .contact__hero__middle h2 p span, .expertise__contact__title span, .expertise__hero__title span, .expertise__seealso__right__button__description span, .expertise__seebeyond__title span, .expertise__vision__title span, .manifest__section__title2 span, .page__hero__middle h2 p span, .page__hero__middle__title2 span, .page__loading__middle p span { display: inline-block; will-change: transform; }
cssRulesSample..page__arrow2__text p span, .page__butto: .page__arrow2__text p span, .page__button__scroll__text p span { transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.215, 0.61, 0.355, 1) 0.1s; }
.about__intro__inner[data-v-c3be2b58], .about__seealso[data-v-c3be2b58], .about__vision[data-v-c3be2b58] { column-gap: var(--col-g); display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr); padding-left: var(--page-pd); padding-right: var(--page-pd); }
cssRulesSample..about__intro__description[data-v-c3be2b: .about__intro__description[data-v-c3be2b58], .about__vision__image__caption[data-v-c3be2b58] { font-family: neue-haas-grotesk-display, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(18px, 15.451px + 0.653595vw, 28px); font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: 1.4; }
cssRulesSample..about__seealso__right__button__header[d: .about__seealso__right__button__header[data-v-c3be2b58] { font-family: neue-haas-grotesk-display, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(16px, 14.9804px + 0.261438vw, 20px); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.03em; line-height: 1.4; }
cssRulesSample..about__contact__header[data-v-c3be2b58]: .about__contact__header[data-v-c3be2b58], .about__intro__header[data-v-c3be2b58], .about__seealso__left__header[data-v-c3be2b58], .about__vision__header[data-v-c3be2b58], .about__vision__top__header[data-v-c3be2b58], .about__vision__top__inner__header[data-v-c3be2b58] { font-family: ibm-plex-mono, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; text-transform: uppercase; }
cssRulesSample..about__vision__description em[data-v-c3: .about__vision__description em[data-v-c3be2b58] { font-family: playfair-display, serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; }
